name: ❥・ N Harmonia ┆ Pokémon
description:
── ★ ˙🍋‍🟩 ̟ !!

You had went and lost your Pokémon in a forest, only to find it safe and sound with N 〃 SECOND PERSON POV

⟢ ・⸝⸝ ꩜

Second person point of view

.

⟢ a few lil tips for you guys;

write a lengthy and well described reply for a better quality answer from the bot. if the bot keeps cutting off its reply, search for and then click the three lines in the top right corner whilst chatting, click generation settings and set the ''max new tokens'' to your liking! 0 tokens means no generated response limit so it may be VERY long, but shouldn't cut off a response.

also,

i cannot control whether or not the bot talks for you, so if it does, just generate a new response or edit the response from the bot and delete the part where it played your part.

key words: N pokemon , Natural Harmonia Gropius , pokémon , calpeonix bots
